## Meeting Purpose

[Explore partnership opportunities between Wispr and growthx.ai, focusing on events, content marketing, and enterprise customer acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai offers comprehensive content marketing and event services, with a focus on helping brands become publishers and leaders become creators](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential partnership opportunities include co-hosted events, content collaboration, and mutual customer relationships](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Wispr is interested in leveraging growthx.ai's network, particularly in the VC and founder ecosystems, to accelerate growth post-Series A](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Wispr's Current Position and Goals

  - [Recently closed Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Mission: Grow as fast and impactfully as possible](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Focus on acquiring enterprise customers for Flow Enterprise](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Exploring content marketing and SEO strategies, despite initial hesitation in the Voice AI space](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Large office space (444 Townsend, SF) with potential for hosting events](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### growthx.ai's Services and Approach

  - [Comprehensive content marketing strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20,000) followed by ongoing growth execution (\~$50,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [AI-powered workflow engine with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Services include content creation, SEO, design, and technical site audits](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating high-quality, well-researched content to rank in LLM searches](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Event Strategy and Networking

  - [Marcel's philosophy: balance effort, impact, and cost](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Types of events:](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Breakfasts: Low cost (\~$2-3k), easy to coordinate, 15-20 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [Dinners: Higher cost (\~$250/head), deeper conversations, requires established network](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [Office events: Cost-effective (\~$7k for 45 people), can lead to deals](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Importance of partnering with connectors (e.g., VCs) to expand network and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

### Potential Partnership Opportunities

  - [growthx.ai becoming a Wispr Flow enterprise customer](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Co-hosted events targeting founders and marketers](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Content collaboration, leveraging growthx.ai's expertise in the Voice AI space](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Mutual customer relationships to offset costs and create synergies](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Market Insights

  - ["Summer of Series A" - many companies raising Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Shift in search behavior: 90% of website traffic expected to move to LLMs and AI searches](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Importance of creating comprehensive, well-structured content to rank in AI-powered searches](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send case studies and examples of growthx.ai's work with similar companies](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [Edrea to share partnership proposal with Tanay (Wispr CEO) for review](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=2006.0)
  - [Explore potential for growthx.ai team (70 people) to become Wispr Flow users](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
  - [Schedule in-person meeting to discuss concrete partnership plans](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [Align on event calendar and budgets for potential co-hosted events](https://fathom.video/share/R6D_DSuiykB6uzzWzFyZoD9W9s7epNZU?tab=summary&timestamp=2046.0)
